languages.text: "В зенитных орудиях, установленных на заставе, нашли критическую нестабильность. Ее необходимо исправить прямо сейчас".

traits.locale_text: "В турелях, установленных на заставе, нашли критическую нестабильность".

languages.text: "A critical instability has been identified in the air defence battery installed at the outpost. It requires immediate repair."
languages.original_text: "В зенитных орудиях, установленных на заставе, нашли критическую нестабильность. Ее необходимо исправить прямо сейчас".

traits.locale_text: "A critical instability has been identified in the air defence battery installed at the outpost. It requires immediate repair."
"A critical instability has been identified in the air defence battery installed at the outpost. It requires immediate repair."
"A critical instability has been identified in the air defence battery installed at the outpost. It requires immediate repair."

languages.text: “前哨的防空炮组存在严重不稳定因素，必须立刻修复。”
languages.original_text: "A critical instability has been identified in the air defence battery installed at the outpost. It requires immediate repair."

traits.locale_text: “前哨的防空炮组存在严重不稳定因素，必须立刻修复。”

languages.text: « On a détecté une instabilité critique dans la batterie de défense antiaérienne installée à l'avant-poste. Des réparations immédiates sont nécessaires. »
languages.original_text: "A critical instability has been identified in the air defence battery installed at the outpost. It requires immediate repair."

traits.locale_text: « On a détecté une instabilité critique dans la batterie de défense antiaérienne installée à l'avant-poste. Des réparations immédiates sont nécessaires. »

languages.text: "Karakola kurulan hava savunma bataryasında kritik bir kararsızlık tespit edildi. Acilen onarılması gerekiyor."
languages.original_text: "A critical instability has been identified in the air defence battery installed at the outpost. It requires immediate repair."

traits.locale_text: "Karakola kurulan hava savunma bataryasında kritik bir kararsızlık tespit edildi. Acilen onarılması gerekiyor."

languages.text: «Se ha identificado una inestabilidad crítica en la batería de defensa antiaérea instalada en el puesto avanzado. Requiere una reparación inmediata».
languages.original_text: "A critical instability has been identified in the air defence battery installed at the outpost. It requires immediate repair."

traits.locale_text: «Se ha identificado una inestabilidad crítica en la batería de defensa antiaérea instalada en el puesto avanzado. Requiere una reparación inmediata».

languages.text: "In der Flugabwehrbatterie des Außenpostens wurde eine kritische Instabilität festgestellt. Sie muss umgehend repariert werden."
languages.original_text: "A critical instability has been identified in the air defence battery installed at the outpost. It requires immediate repair."

traits.locale_text: "In der Flugabwehrbatterie des Außenpostens wurde eine kritische Instabilität festgestellt. Sie muss umgehend repariert werden."

languages.text: 「要塞に設置された防空砲の重大な不具合が判明しました。即時修理が必要です。」
languages.original_text: "A critical instability has been identified in the air defence battery installed at the outpost. It requires immediate repair."

traits.locale_text: 「要塞に設置された防空砲の重大な不具合が判明しました。即時修理が必要です。」
